title: Re-assign Dependency
excerpt: I have mapped dependencies between items in my project board. However, when I delete one item, the platform doesn’t automatically reassign the dependencies to the next logical item. Is there a way to resolve this without…

posts.author: BlackBorder (Em Dee)
posts.cookedHtml: I have mapped dependencies between items in my project board. However, when I delete one item, the platform doesn’t automatically reassign the dependencies to the next logical item. Is there a way to resolve this without the need for a third-party app?

posts.author: ZakiImtiaz (Zaki | readylogic.co)
posts.cookedHtml:
No, there ain’t a native automation that resolves your current issue.

In case you need any help setting it up let me know here and I’ll be happy to assist.

Zaki

Business Workflow Consultant

Ready Logic
